Title: Hudson & Rex
Actors: Mayko Nguyen, Kevin Hanchard, Justin Kelly
Plot: HUDSON and REX is an action-packed one-hour police procedural drama focused on the partnership between detective Charlie Hudson and his partner Rex, an extraordinary former K9 dog. When a puzzling crime emerges, the dynamic duo are on the case - with Charlie's deft detective work and Rex's keen canine senses, this crime-fighting pair is unstoppable.
